hero.intro: Senior Frontend Engineer based in São Paulo, Brazil. Specialized in React, TypeScript, and JavaScript. Currently working, crafting solutions that transform digital experiences.

home.marquee: Clean Code • Pixel Perfect • Performance First • User Focused •

approach.label: Approach
approach.quote: "The details are not the details. They make the design."

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.description: I believe great software is built on the foundation of clean architecture and obsessive attention to detail. From component design to performance optimization, every decision shapes the final experience.

about.label: About Me
about.name: Lucas Pazzim
about.tagline: Senior Frontend Engineer based in <0>São Paulo, Brazil</0>, specialized in React, TypeScript, and JavaScript.
about.para1: I'm passionate about technology, innovation, and detail-oriented development. My focus is on creating exceptional user experiences through clean code, thoughtful architecture, and attention to the smallest details.
about.para2: Currently working, crafting solutions that transform digital experiences. I develop and maintain complex components that enable users to build applications intuitively, collaborating with DevOps teams using Docker, Vite, and modern tooling.

cta.title: Have a Project in Mind?
cta.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.

about.label: About
about.name: Lucas Pazzim
about.tagline: Senior Frontend Engineer based in <0>São Paulo, Brazil</0>, specialized in React, TypeScript, and JavaScript.
about.para1: I'm passionate about technology, innovation, and detail-oriented development. My focus is on creating exceptional user experiences through clean code, thoughtful architecture, and attention to the smallest details.
about.para2: Currently working, crafting solutions that transform digital experiences. I develop and maintain complex components that enable users to build applications intuitively, collaborating with DevOps teams using Docker for containerization, Vite for fast development, and pnpm for package management.
about.para3: My work approach is detail-oriented and open-minded, with a strong focus on creating efficient and maintainable code, always seeking to enhance user experience through technical excellence.

experience.description: Development and maintenance of complex components that enable users to build applications intuitively. Implementation of performance optimizations and innovative features in collaboration with cross-functional teams.
Building responsive websites using HTML, CSS3, JavaScript, jQuery, and Bootstrap. Collaboration with backend engineers to optimize API calls and maintenance of legacy applications.

contact.intro: Interested in collaborating? Let's talk about your next project.

blog.intro: Thoughts on frontend development, React, and building great user experiences.

react-dashboard.description: A modern analytics dashboard built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Features real-time data visualization, responsive design, and dark mode support.

design-system.description: A comprehensive design system and component library built with React and Storybook. Includes 50+ accessible, customizable components following atomic design principles.

ecommerce-platform.description: A performant e-commerce platform with server-side rendering, optimized checkout flow, and seamless payment integration using Stripe.

developer-tools.description: A collection of developer productivity tools including CLI utilities, VS Code extensions, and automation scripts to streamline development workflows.

api-gateway.description: A scalable API gateway handling authentication, rate limiting, and request routing for microservices architecture serving millions of requests.

data-visualization.description: Interactive data visualization projects exploring complex datasets through animated charts, graphs, and creative visual storytelling.

performance-audit.description: In-depth technical article on web performance optimization techniques, covering Core Web Vitals, code splitting, and lazy loading strategies.

debugging-guide.description: Comprehensive guide to debugging JavaScript applications, covering browser DevTools, React DevTools, and advanced debugging techniques.
